title.value: Northstar Ops paid media discovery call

business_health_summary.value: Northstar Ops has grown pipeline through outbound but paid acquisition is not producing enough qualified demo requests.

pain.value: Paid search leads are booking demos but frequently lack buying authority.

evidence.value: We're getting demo bookings from search, but half of them are coordinators who cannot approve anything.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

signal.value: The team is currently spending $18,000 per month on Google Ads.

evidence.value: Right now we are spending about eighteen thousand a month on Google Ads, and I need to justify keeping that live.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

context.value: LedgerFlow appears in late-stage deals but is described as implementation-heavy.

evidence.value: LedgerFlow comes up with finance teams, but prospects keep telling us it looks too heavy to implement.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

trigger.value: A board review in six weeks is creating urgency to improve qualified pipeline reporting.

evidence.value: We have a board review in six weeks, so I need a cleaner story on qualified pipeline before then.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

objection.value: The buyer is concerned about pausing campaigns during message testing.

resolution.value: The strategist proposed testing new qualification messaging without pausing the existing campaigns.

evidence.value: My main hesitation is we cannot go dark for two weeks while we rewrite everything.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

company_size.value: Northstar Ops sells to operations teams at companies with 200 to 1,000 employees.

role.value: The buyer described VP Operations and finance operations leaders as the strongest opportunities.

industry.value: The strongest segment discussed was B2B SaaS operations teams.

decision_process.value: Marketing can recommend vendors, but finance operations and the CFO need to approve.

decision_timeline.value: The team wants a plan ready before the board review in six weeks.

what_fails.value: Search campaigns are producing demo bookings from people without approval authority.

evidence.value: Search is still our biggest paid channel, and LinkedIn retargeting is really just air cover right now.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

primary_goal.value: Improve qualified pipeline from paid campaigns before the board review.

success_metrics.value: At least 12 sales-qualified demos from paid search in the next month.

evidence.value: If we can get twelve sales-qualified demos from paid search next month, that gives me something credible to take to the board.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

action.value: AIGOS will send a revised qualification messaging outline by Friday.

evidence.value: I'll send the qualification messaging outline by Friday so you can review it before the campaign meeting.
evidence.speaker: Leo Patel

decision.value: The first test will target qualification messaging rather than a full campaign rebuild.

evidence.value: Let's start with qualification messaging first, not a full rebuild, and see if the demo quality changes.
evidence.speaker: Maya Chen

notable_quotes.value: I do not need more leads; I need fewer calls with people who cannot buy.
notable_quotes.speaker: Maya Chen
